task_completion.description: Open the baseline eCRM-001 model in OpenVSP
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP application window is open, displaying the original single-fuselage eCRM-001 model in the 3D workspace.

task_completion.description: Reposition Fuselage, Vertical Tail, and Horizontal Tail to Y=14.0m and enable XZ Planar Symmetry
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP geometry editor shows the Y location set to 14.0 for the Fuselage, Vertical Tail, and Horizontal Tail, with XZ symmetry enabled. The 3D view must clearly show two fuselages and duplicated tail sections offset from the center.

task_completion.description: Expand the main Wing to a Span of 75.0m and Root Chord of 10.0m
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP geometry editor for the main Wing shows the Span parameter set to 75.0 and Root Chord set to 10.0. The 3D view shows a significantly widened main wing bridging the gap between the two fuselages.

task_completion.description: Scale the Horizontal Tail span to 25.0m
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP geometry editor for the Horizontal Tail shows the Span parameter set to 25.0.

task_completion.description: Save the modified model as twin_fuselage_launcher.vsp3
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP window title bar, 'Save As' dialog, or a terminal window shows the file being saved exactly as 'twin_fuselage_launcher.vsp3' in the /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenVSP graphical user interface to make modifications
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with OpenVSP's Geometry Browser and parameter windows, rather than just editing the .vsp3 XML file in a text editor.

integrity.description: The 3D model view visually reflects the parameter changes
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP 3D workspace must actually display the twin-fuselage layout and expanded wing, proving the parameters were applied to the active model.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely saved the modified model
integrity.visual_evidence: The save operation should be visible via OpenVSP's File > Save As menu, rather than just renaming the original file in the terminal without making the required geometric changes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target parameters for verification: Fuselage/Tails Y-location = 14.0 m, Wing Span = 75.0 m, Wing Root Chord = 10.0 m, Horizontal Tail Span = 25.0 m. Expected output file: /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/twin_fuselage_launcher.vsp3.
